channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hearts and Celtic face winner-takes-all clash in Scottish Premiership finale
item.description: The Scottish Premiership title race has reached a dramatic conclusion, with Hearts and Celtic set for a decisive final match. Hearts, under Derek McInnes, have led the league for most of the season an...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Announces Star-Studded Lineup for Final Week of ‘Late Show’
item.description: Stephen Colbert is preparing for his final week on air at “The Late Show” with a series of special episodes featuring prominent guests. The CBS late-night program’s schedule for May 18 includes a Mond...

item.title: Legal Experts Question Trump's $10 Billion IRS Lawsuit and Proposed Settlement Fund
item.description: A recent segment on MS NOW's 'All In' highlighted concerns over former President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS. According to host Chris Hayes, the lawsuit could serve as a vehicle...

item.title: Experts Warn Gas Tax Holiday Would Provide Minimal Savings and Harm Infrastructure Funding
item.description: As gas prices remain high across the United States, President Donald Trump has proposed a temporary suspension of the federal gas tax, an idea also being considered in Congress. However, experts argue...

item.title: INEC Receives and Begins Verification of Party Membership Registers Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: INEC don confirm say all the 22 registered political parties for Nigeria don submit their membership registers as required by the Electoral Act 2026. According to statement wey Mohammed Haruna, the ch...

item.title: CPA Roble Said Nuno Named CEO and Commission Secretary at CRA
item.description: The Commission on Revenue Allocation (CRA) has officially appointed CPA Roble Said Nuno as its new Chief Executive Officer and Commission Secretary, following a competitive recruitment process that at...

item.title: Man Encounters King Cobra Inside Hotel Toilet, Safely Removed by Staff
item.description: A man visiting a resort in Don Salvador Benedicto, Philippines, had a shock of his life when he discovered a king cobra resting inside a traditional toilet. The highly venomous snake had apparently en...

item.title: Nottingham couple receive suspended sentences for arranging marriages of their underage sons in Pakistan
item.description: A couple from Nottingham have received suspended prison sentences after taking their underage sons to Pakistan to enter into marriage. The parents, in their 50s and 40s, travelled with their teenage s...

item.title: Gwadar University VC and three others missing after suspected abduction near Mastung
item.description: In a worrying development from Balochistan, the vice chancellor of Gwadar University, Prof Dr Abdul Razzaq Sabir, along with Pro-Vice Chancellor Prof Dr Syed Manzoor Ahmed, staff officer Irshad Ahmed,...

item.title: Lahore High Court Rules No Super Tax on Capital Gains from Inherited Property
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has recently delivered a significant judgement regarding taxation of inherited property. A two-judge bench, led by Justice Jawad Hassan and Justice Sardar Akbar Ali, declar...

item.title: Nigerian Police Begin Recruitment for Specialized Drone Unit, Target Tech-Savvy Officers
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force don start fresh recruitment for their special Drone Section under the Police Airwing. Dem dey find officers wey sabi drone operations, don attend drone training before, or wey...

item.title: Analysis of Chalmers’ Budget and Its Economic Implications
item.description: Forty years after Paul Keating warned that Australia risked becoming a 'banana republic' if economic reforms were not implemented, contemporary Treasurer Jim Chalmers has released a budget that some c...

item.title: Five Italian divers perish in underwater cave incident in the Maldives
item.description: A tragic diving incident in the Maldives has claimed the lives of five Italian divers, who became trapped in a sea cave off Alimathaa island in the Vaavu Atoll. The divers, including marine biologists...

item.title: Rep. Ro Khanna Corrects Misrepresentations About Trump's Iran Policy on Fox News
item.description: On May 15, 2026, U.S. Representative Ro Khanna (D-CA) engaged in a heated discussion with Fox News host Maria Bartiromo regarding U.S. foreign policy toward Iran under President Donald Trump compared ...

item.title: Jodie Foster and Daniel Auteuil shine in quirky French comedy
item.description: A Private Life is a French comedy that revitalises the classic 'odd couple' formula with wit and charm. Starring Jodie Foster and Daniel Auteuil, the film follows a divorced pair of medical profession...

item.title: Life in Chicago During the Late 1950s and Early 1960s Captured in Vintage Photos
item.description: This article presents a vivid glimpse into life in Chicago during the late 1950s and early 1960s through a series of captivating vintage photographs by Laird Scott. Chicago, known as the “City of Broa...

item.title: Toronto Police Board seeks independent probe into antisemitism concerns within force
item.description: The Toronto Police Service Board has formally requested an expedited, independent inspection into allegations of antisemitism within the city’s police force. The request was submitted to Ontario’s Ins...

item.title: Fadiel Adams to Apply for Bail Over Alleged Interference in Murder Investigation
item.description: Fadiel Adams, leader of the National Coloured Congress and a sitting Member of Parliament, is scheduled to appear at the Pinetown Magistrate’s Court in KwaZulu-Natal to apply for bail. Adams was arres...

item.title: Historic U.S. Route 66 Celebrates 100 Years, Drawing Travelers to Small Towns
item.description: As U.S. Route 66 celebrates its centennial, historic small towns along the iconic highway are seeing renewed interest from travelers. Stretching across eight states, Route 66 once served as a major ro...

item.title: Two People Injured in Multiple Shootings and Carjacking in Prince George’s County
item.description: On Friday afternoon, Prince George’s County police reported a series of shootings and a carjacking that left two people injured, one critically. The incidents caused significant concern in the communi...
